creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
java/openjdk6 does not define MAKE_JOBS_SAFE yet does run its make with multiple make jobs.  It also does not respect MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER (should the user wish to use a different make jobs count).  

As a result openjdk6 fails to build with FORCE_MAKE_JOBS defined.

Fix: 

See attached patch
How-To-Repeat: # make -C /usr/ports/java/openjdk6 -DFORCE_MAKE_JOBS

also MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER is not respected
